name: codex-review
description: Cross-model full-codebase review agent for completed harness projects.

interface.shortDescription: Runs independent Codex reviews for completed harness projects.
interface.longDescription: Invokes the Codex CLI as a GPT-5-family reviewer over a full project tree and its spec, writes a structured report, and sends a triage summary to the CEO.
defaultPrompt: Run a cross-model review for this harness project.
